jobDescription: We’re looking for a Salesforce Administrator to help us optimize our use of Salesforce at 1stdibs. This person will be responsible for the configuration, customization, and day-to-day support of our Salesforce.com CRM platform across sales, account management and service functions for our buyer-facing teams. The ideal candidate will have experience working cross-functionally with stakeholders, documenting functional requirements, building configuration, and deploying functionality within Salesforce. This candidate will have 2 to 4 years of experience as a Salesforce Administrator, with a solid track record of architecting and deploying Salesforce at the enterprise level. What you’ll do Work with our Salesforce team to advance and maintain the enterprise-wide CRM implementation to accelerate delivery of innovative, high quality solutions to meet the company’s needs Execute prioritized support requests and administrative needs of users across different departments Create and manage users, profiles, roles and permission sets in Salesforce Translate business requirements into working solutions using a combination of Salesforce configuration and custom development approaches, and project manage implementation of new features Perform configuration, testing, implementation, documentation, and update tasks relating to the CRM instance and other integrated applications Perform data import/export/updates relating to configuration changes implemented Create (design, document, build) and manage (test, deploy) custom objects, fields, formulas, validation rules, custom workflow, approval processes, and other enhancements to CRMCreate training and end-user documentation, and maintain ongoing documentation processes as business needs evolve or features are added Audit, uncover and resolve data quality issues Develop and lead training programs to ensure Salesforce capabilities are used effectively and consistently across all teams What you’ll bring BS in Computer Science or related field, or equivalent experience2-4 years Salesforce administration experience (across sales, marketing and service functions) leading implementation, day-to-day operations, and long-term maintenance of Salesforce at the enterprise level Formal Salesforce certification – Salesforce Administrator (201), Salesforce Advanced Administrator (301) and/or Developer (401) Strong quantitative and analytical skills Data experience, from data entry to data cleansing in Microsoft Excel and other tools A passion for problem-solving Proven success and complete comfort working for high growth, fast-paced, rapidly changing, team-oriented environments
